doc-1773733495092-ugmrxr.title: QA Checklist
doc-1773733495092-ugmrxr.content:
# QA Checklist — Infrastructure as Code: Observability & Deploy Stack
## Milestone 1: Unified Infra Compose
### Phase 1: Infra compose with Postgres, Langfuse, and Umami
> Create docker-compose.infra.yml with: (1) Postgres 16 container with init scripts that create langfuse and umami databases, (2) Langfuse server container on port 3012, (3) Umami container on port 3013. Add health checks. Create infra/ directory with Postgres init SQL. All services on shared automaker-infra network.

- [ ] docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml up -d starts all 3 services
- [ ] Langfuse UI accessible at localhost:3012
- [ ] Umami UI accessible at localhost:3013
- [ ] Health checks pass for all services

### Phase 2: Add Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, and Promtail
> Extend docker-compose.infra.yml with Prometheus, Loki, Promtail, and Grafana with pre-provisioned datasources on port 3010. Create config files in infra/ subdirectories.

- [ ] Grafana accessible at localhost:3010 with datasources pre-configured
- [ ] Prometheus scraping targets visible
- [ ] Docker logs visible in Grafana via Loki
- [ ] All services healthy

### Phase 3: Delete old compose files and configs
> Delete docker-compose.monitoring.yml, docker-compose.observability.yml, and their config directories (monitoring/, observability/). Update docs referencing old files.

- [ ] Old compose files deleted
- [ ] Old config directories deleted
- [ ] No broken references in docs
- [ ] npm run build passes

## Milestone 2: Fix Deploy Pipeline
### Phase 1: Fix deploy-staging.yml rebuild step
> Diagnose and fix the failing Rebuild and restart staging step. Check SSH keys, docker compose paths, build context. Add proper error output.

- [ ] deploy-staging.yml runs successfully end-to-end
- [ ] Staging containers rebuild and restart on push to staging
- [ ] Failed steps produce visible error output

### Phase 2: Add infra stack to deploy pipeline
> Update deploy-staging.yml to manage infra compose stack alongside app. Add deploy-infra.yml for independent infra restarts.

- [ ] App deploy ensures infra stack is running
- [ ] deploy-infra.yml can independently restart infra
- [ ] Health checks verify all infra services post-deploy

## Milestone 3: Wire App to Local Stack
### Phase 1: Point OTel and Langfuse to local instance
> Update env config to point LANGFUSE_BASE_URL to local Langfuse. Add OTel DiagConsoleLogger to surface export failures. Verify traces land. Update docs.

- [ ] OTel traces land in local Langfuse
- [ ] DiagConsoleLogger surfaces export errors in logs
- [ ] Agent execution creates visible traces

### Phase 2: Wire Umami tracking into UI and landing site
> Add Umami tracking script to UI and landing site. Use env vars for config. Only load in production builds.

- [ ] Umami tracking script loads on staging UI
- [ ] Page views visible in Umami dashboard
- [ ] Tracking script not loaded in dev mode

## Milestone 4: Context Engine Observability
### Phase 1: Add OTel spans to context engine operations
> Instrument context engine with OpenTelemetry spans for LeafCompactor.compact(), Condensation.condense(), ContextAssembler.assemble(), and ConversationStore operations. Use OTel tracer API so spans flow through existing NodeSDK to Langfuse. Add featureId as span attribute.

- [ ] Compaction operations create spans in Langfuse
- [ ] Assembly spans include budget and message count attributes
- [ ] Spans correlated via featureId attribute
- [ ] npm run build:packages passes

### Phase 2: Add Langfuse generation spans for compaction LLM calls
> Wrap compaction LLM calls (LeafCompactor, Condensation) with Langfuse generation spans capturing model, tokens, cost, latency. Pass LangfuseClient through context engine config from AgentSessionManager.

- [ ] Compaction LLM calls appear as Langfuse generations
- [ ] Cost tracking works for compaction calls
- [ ] Graceful no-op when Langfuse unavailable
- [ ] npm run build:packages and npm run build:server pass
